callDisconnectedAutoRouted.template: 🚫 Call Disconnected (auto-routed) Wallet: $${usdBal} — below $${lowBalTrigger} threshold. 💰 Top up at least $${lowBalResume} to resume calling.

callDisconnectedWalletInsufficient.template: 🚫 Call Disconnected — Wallet insufficient (need $${rate}/min + $${connFee} connect fee).\nTop up via 👛 Wallet.

callDisconnectedWalletExhausted.template: 🚫 Call Disconnected — Wallet exhausted.\nTop up via 👛 Wallet.

outboundCallFailedRouting.template: 🚫 Outbound Call Failed\n📞 ${fromPhone} → ${toPhone}\nReason: Call routing failed. Please try again.

planMinutesExhausted.template: ⚠️ Plan Minutes Exhausted 📞 ${phoneNumber} Used: ${used}/${limit} minutes this cycle. Overage billing is now active from your wallet. Top up or upgrade your plan.

orphanedNumberAlert.template: ⚠️ Orphaned Number Alert 📞 ${to} received inbound call from ${from} ❌ No owner found in DB — call rejected. This number may need to be released or re-assigned.

overageActive.template: 💰 Overage Active — Plan minutes exhausted. ${chargedStr} (${region}) from ${currency} wallet.

callEndedPlanWalletExhausted.template: 🚫 Call Ended — Plan minutes + wallet exhausted.\n⏱️ ~${elapsedMin} min. Top up wallet or upgrade plan.

testCallsExpired.template: ⏰ Test Calls Expired Your free SIP test has ended. Please disconnect your SIP client to stop retrying. 💡 To make more calls, purchase a Cloud Phone plan from the main menu.

outboundCallBlocked.template: 🚫 Outbound Call Blocked\n📞 ${fromPhone} → ${toPhone}\nReason: Number is ${status}. Please renew or contact support.

sipCallBlocked.template: 🚫 SIP Call Blocked — Wallet balance insufficient (need $${sipRate}/min + $${connFee} connect fee ${region}).\nBalance: $${usdBal} / NGN: ₦${ngnBal}\nOutbound calls are billed from wallet. Top up via 👛 Wallet.

outboundCallFailedTempUnavailable.template: 🚫 Outbound Call Failed\n📞 ${fromPhone} → ${toPhone}\nReason: Outbound calling is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

lowBalanceForward.template: ⚠️ Low Balance — $${usdBal} (~${estMinutes} min fwd). Top up $25 via 👛 Wallet.

lowBalanceIvrForward.template: ⚠️ Low Balance — $${usdBal} (~${estMinutes} min IVR fwd). Top up via 👛 Wallet.

ivrCallEndedWalletExhausted.template: 🚫 IVR Call Ended — Wallet exhausted ($${usdBal}).\nIVR calls cost $${ivrCallRate}/min. Top up via 👛 Wallet.

callNotConnected.template: 📞 Call not connected — the recipient was busy or didn't answer.\n\n🎁 Your free trial call is still available! Try again anytime.
